primary_api.brief: LottieAnimationView is a View for displaying Lottie vector animations.

members.brief: Creates an initialized LottieAnimationView.
members.name: New

members.brief: Sets the depth index for the animation.
members.name: SetDepthIndex

members.brief: Sets the desired rasterization height as a hint for the renderer.
members.name: SetDesiredHeight

members.brief: Sets the desired rasterization width as a hint for the renderer.
members.name: SetDesiredWidth

members.brief: Sets a per-frame dynamic property callback on a specific layer/element.

members.brief: Enables or disables frame caching.

section_policy.guidance: After the title, overview, and table of contents, choose feature-specific topic sections. Do not use a fixed section template for every feature. Sections should explain meaningful usage themes rather than list APIs mechanically.

rules: Use dali-ui symbols as the app-facing API surface.
Use dali-core and dali-adaptor symbols only as setup/background unless the usage pattern explicitly marks them preferred.
Prefer View-based examples over raw Actor object-model examples.

usage_patterns.intent: Create and configure the primary object using public dali-ui APIs.
usage_patterns.usage_note: Prefer typed constructors and setters when available.

usage_patterns.intent: React to user or resource events through public signals.
usage_patterns.usage_note: Use signal connection APIs only with their owning trait or class.

symbols.brief: Property index definitions for LottieAnimationView.

members.brief: The desired decoding height hint in pixels. 0 means no constraint.
members.name: DESIRED_HEIGHT

members.brief: The desired decoding width hint in pixels. 0 means no constraint.
members.name: DESIRED_WIDTH

members.brief: Whether to cache each rasterized frame to avoid re-rasterization.
members.name: ENABLE_FRAME_CACHE

members.brief: Playback speed multiplier. 1.0 is normal speed.
members.name: FRAME_SPEED_FACTOR

members.brief: The URL of the Lottie JSON animation file.
members.name: IMAGE

members.brief: The color tint to apply to the rendered animation.
members.name: IMAGE_COLOR

members.brief: The looping mode (RESTART or AUTO_REVERSE).
members.name: LOOPING_MODE

members.brief: The number of times to loop. -1 for infinite.
members.name: LOOP_COUNT

members.brief: Whether to notify ResourceReadySignal after each rasterization completes.
members.name: NOTIFY_AFTER_RASTERIZATION

members.brief: The URL of the placeholder image shown while loading.
members.name: PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE

members.brief: Whether to apply pre-multiplied alpha to the rendered output.
members.name: PRE_MULTIPLIED_ALPHA

members.brief: Enumeration for the start and end property ranges for this control.
members.name: PropertyRange

members.brief: Whether to redraw every frame when the view is being scaled down.
members.name: REDRAW_IN_SCALING_DOWN

members.brief: Whether to redraw every frame when the view is being scaled up.
members.name: REDRAW_IN_SCALING_UP

members.brief: Controls when the visual's texture resources are released.
members.name: RELEASE_POLICY

members.brief: Scale factor applied to the rasterization size relative to the visual size.
members.name: RENDER_SCALE

members.brief: The behavior when the animation is stopped.
members.name: STOP_BEHAVIOR

members.brief: Whether to load the animation synchronously on the event thread.
members.name: SYNCHRONOUS_LOADING
